legend.manual: Entered by hand in the app

tab.emptyProfile: Select or create a profile to route your health & fitness data.
tab.description: Choose where each type of data flows to and from. Every state reflects your live connections — never a guess.

sourcePriority.title: Multiple sources
sourcePriority.description: When more than one integration imports the same data, keep them all (union) or rank a winner (priority).
